title: Cinematic Cosmic Spacecraft Vista AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Cosmic Spacecraft Vista AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: A reusable cinematic cosmic spacecraft vista built around colossal interstellar ark with illuminated hull windows. Signature Elements: colossal interstellar ark with illuminated hull windows, swirling purple and orange nebula with dust lanes, and massive ringed planet looming in the distance must work together to create overwhelming scale. Layout Logic: spacecraft scale, planet/nebula depth, and empty cosmic space should remain legible at first glance. Worldbuilding: swirling purple and orange nebula with dust lanes, massive ringed planet looming in the distance, and vibrant violet, amber, deep-space blue, and black carry the sense of distance, danger, and awe. Composition: stable composition, vast cosmic scale, spacecraft as the readable anchor, deep-space background layers, and cinematic negative space. Style: Cinematic deep-space concept art with monumental scale, luminous nebula color, crisp spacecraft detail, and expansive science-fiction atmosphere. Restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition. Subject: colossal interstellar ark with illuminated hull windows as the primary scale anchor against the cosmic environment. Scene: swirling purple and orange nebula with dust lanes and massive ringed planet looming in the distance define the depth, atmosphere, and sense of cosmic scale. Color Palette: vibrant violet, amber, deep-space blue, and black controls the nebula, planet, spacecraft, and deep-space atmosphere without flattening cosmic contrast. Materials: spacecraft hull surfaces, nebula glow, planetary atmosphere, and deep-space scale cues remain crisp.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Colossal Interstellar Ark With Illuminated Hull

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: A reusable cinematic cosmic spacecraft vista built around industrial cargo vessel with glowing engine trail. Signature Elements: industrial cargo vessel with glowing engine trail, red-orange storm nebula with dark cosmic clouds, and enormous eclipsed planet behind the ship must work together to create overwhelming scale. Layout Logic: spacecraft scale, planet/nebula depth, and empty cosmic space should remain legible at first glance. Worldbuilding: red-orange storm nebula with dark cosmic clouds, enormous eclipsed planet behind the ship, and burnt orange, crimson, graphite, and star-white accents carry the sense of distance, danger, and awe. Composition: stable composition, vast cosmic scale, spacecraft as the readable anchor, deep-space background layers, and cinematic negative space. Style: Cinematic deep-space concept art with monumental scale, luminous nebula color, crisp spacecraft detail, and expansive science-fiction atmosphere. Restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition. Subject: industrial cargo vessel with glowing engine trail as the primary scale anchor against the cosmic environment. Scene: red-orange storm nebula with dark cosmic clouds and enormous eclipsed planet behind the ship define the depth, atmosphere, and sense of cosmic scale. Color Palette: burnt orange, crimson, graphite, and star-white accents controls the nebula, planet, spacecraft, and deep-space atmosphere without flattening cosmic contrast. Materials: spacecraft hull surfaces, nebula glow, planetary atmosphere, and deep-space scale cues remain crisp.

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: A reusable cinematic cosmic spacecraft vista built around sleek exploration cruiser with long reflective solar fins. Signature Elements: sleek exploration cruiser with long reflective solar fins, icy blue star nursery and scattered asteroid silhouettes, and small moon crossing in front of a pale gas giant must work together to create overwhelming scale. Layout Logic: spacecraft scale, planet/nebula depth, and empty cosmic space should remain legible at first glance. Worldbuilding: icy blue star nursery and scattered asteroid silhouettes, small moon crossing in front of a pale gas giant, and cool cyan, silver, deep indigo, and white highlights carry the sense of distance, danger, and awe. Composition: stable composition, vast cosmic scale, spacecraft as the readable anchor, deep-space background layers, and cinematic negative space. Style: Cinematic deep-space concept art with monumental scale, luminous nebula color, crisp spacecraft detail, and expansive science-fiction atmosphere. Restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition. Subject: sleek exploration cruiser with long reflective solar fins as the primary scale anchor against the cosmic environment. Scene: icy blue star nursery and scattered asteroid silhouettes and small moon crossing in front of a pale gas giant define the depth, atmosphere, and sense of cosmic scale. Color Palette: cool cyan, silver, deep indigo, and white highlights controls the nebula, planet, spacecraft, and deep-space atmosphere without flattening cosmic contrast. Materials: spacecraft hull surfaces, nebula glow, planetary atmosphere, and deep-space scale cues remain crisp.
